seo.title: Fleet partnership – company car
seo.description: Join our fleet and work with a company car. Check the cooperation terms, settlement system, and driver requirements in Rzeszów.

intro.description: We provide the car, maintenance, and full operational support. You focus on driving and earning — under clear and transparent terms.

points: After 2 months of cooperation, we reimburse the cost of medical exams
Reimbursement applies regardless of when the exams were completed
Maintenance and insurance covered by us
Up to 60% revenue share with long-term cooperation

items.title: Earnings
content: Income is calculated based on turnover in the apps. From the first day of cooperation, you receive 50% of revenue, and all costs remain on our side.
After two months of cooperation, we reimburse medical exam costs, and your revenue share increases to 55%.
With long-term cooperation, your share can reach up to 60% of revenue.

items.title: Bonuses and tips
content: Ride-hailing platforms such as Bolt and Uber regularly organize bonus campaigns for drivers. These include additional payments for completing a specified number of trips or staying online for a certain period.
The full amount received is the driver's income — we do not deduct commission or VAT.
All tips, including those given through the app, go 100% to the driver.

items.title: Car, maintenance and insurance
items.intro: We provide a vehicle fully prepared for taxi work. Each car is equipped with:

items.title: Work with Bolt / Uber
items.intro: We provide full formal support when starting cooperation.
content: Training on how to use the mobile applications

items.title: Expenses
items.intro: When we say all costs are on our side, we truly mean all of them.

contact.title: Driver application – company car
contact.description: Leave your contact details and we will get in touch to explain the next steps of cooperation.

fullCapacity.title: Currently, all driver positions are filled
fullCapacity.text:
All our vehicles are currently assigned to drivers, and we are not actively recruiting at the moment.

We are continuously expanding our fleet — when new vehicles become available, we will contact you first using the details provided in the form.
